actions.title: chore(deps): update Go patch dependencies
actions.description:
Updates 3 Go dependencies to latest patch versions.

- github.com/go-chi/chi/v5: v5.0.11 -> v5.0.14
- github.com/rs/zerolog: v1.31.0 -> v1.31.2
- github.com/spf13/viper: v1.18.1 -> v1.18.2

actions.title: chore(deps): github.com/jackc/pgx/v5 v6.0.0 available (major)
actions.body:
A major version update is available for pgx.

**Current**: v5.5.1
**Available**: v6.0.0
**Released**: 2026-02-15

## Breaking Changes
- Connection pool API changed
- `pgxpool.New()` replaces `pgxpool.Connect()`

## Migration Guide
https://github.com/jackc/pgx/wiki/Upgrading-to-v6

## Affected Files
- internal/db/postgres.go
- internal/db/pool.go
